pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh script and task_utils.sh which restore and launch the database from this path
Calculated from Chinook database: SELECT SUM(total) FROM invoices returns 2328.6
Verified by examining ODB file structure and create_chinook_odb.py which writes HSQLDB script to 'database/script' within the ODB zip archive (lines 254)
Both view names are explicitly mentioned in task description and task.json metadata field

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database containing 412 invoice records with a total cumulative revenue of $2,328.60. The database includes real iTunes media data combined with fictitious customer and employee records. The ODB file will be created at /home/ga/chinook.odb as an HSQLDB-embedded database within a ZIP archive. The HSQLDB schema script is stored at the 'database/script' path within the ODB file. The task requires creating two views: MonthlyRevenue (aggregating sales by month from the Invoice table) and CumulativeRevenue (calculating running total revenue using a correlated subquery).
